name: Skill Challenge: Beat 20 — White Waste Crossing

text.content:
Skill Challenge: Beat 20 — White Waste Crossing

Act: Act 3 | Difficulty: Hard (DC 15)

Successes Needed: 6 | Failures Allowed: 3

Overview

The party leaves the Emberwell behind with Kaelen walking beside them — still human, still herself, but changed. Golden undertones in her skin, ember-flecks in her eyes, warmth radiating from her body. Each day she is a little less steady, a little more luminous. The terrain is familiar from Act 2, but deteriorated — the Rot has advanced, the ground itself is failing, and organized draugr columns are marching toward Hrafnborg. 70 miles over 5 days, south-southeast from Surt's Forge toward the Steam-Oasis.

NPC Assistance: Lew contributes once per round (Intuition +2 or Reason +2). His navigation remains sharp, though the terrain's changes have dimmed his Wyrd-eye.

Advantage: Kaelen's warmth radiates in a Close Burst 4. Within this radius, cold-based conditions are suppressed. Heroes staying near her gain an advantage on cold-resistance tests.

Running the Skill Challenge

Each character takes a turn attempting one skill check. On their turn, a player describes how they're helping the party and rolls the appropriate skill against DC 15. A success adds to the group's total; a failure adds to the failure count. If the party reaches 6 successes before 3 failures, they succeed overall.

Suggested Skills:

  • Athletics
  • Acrobatics or Stealth
  • Arcana or Investigation
  • Perception, Survival, or Insight
  • Persuasion, Intimidation, or Deception

Players may also suggest creative skill uses — reward good roleplaying with advantage or a lower DC.

Complications

Round 1: The White Waste — Days 1–3. The party descends through the transition zone. Snow has taken on a faint grey tinge — Rot-spore contamination from below. The air is cold but not clean.

  • Navigate the changing terrain (Reason TN 13): The landscape has shifted since Act 2. Roads are obscured, landmarks have moved or vanished. Route-finding by intuition and memory.
  • Keep Kaelen moving (Presence TN 12): Kaelen stumbles during drift-periods, stops walking entirely. Someone must guide her, coax her back when she wanders.
  • Endure the deteriorating cold (Might TN 13): The cold is brittle and crystalline, finding gaps in armor. Failure: Frostbite condition (−1 to Agility tests until warm rest).
  • Scavenge or preserve supplies (Intuition TN 14): Forage along dead farmsteads and old shelters, or ration supplies carefully.
  • Spot the cairn field (Intuition TN 14): An old burial ground has been searched by Grafvitnir's agents. Root-line mapping. Reveals organized draugr movement patterns.
  • Hold the party's nerve (Presence TN 12): Watching the gold creep across Kaelen's skin erodes focus. Morale support for the group.

Round 1 Interlude: The Disturbed Cairns. The party discovers a memorial ground with cairns broken and searched — Grafvitnir's agents mapping root-lines. Kaelen has a moment of lucidity: "They're trying to find where the network converges." Organized draugr tracks march southwest toward Hrafnborg.

Later Rounds

Round 2: The Rot Advances — Days 3–5. The White Waste gives way to mixed terrain. The Rot is moving faster here — ground that was solid in Act 2 is now corrupted marshland. The air tastes wrong.

  • Navigate corrupted marshland (Reason TN 13): Rot-corrupted terrain blocks the path. Ford through (costs Heat, risks Rot-exposure), find alternate route (costs time), or repair a trail (Reason + tools).
  • Resist the Rot's presence (Might TN 13): Thick spore-clouds. Failure: Sickened condition (−1 to all tests until warm rest).
  • Avoid or move past undead columns (Agility TN 14): Organized draugr columns moved through hours ago. Move parallel to avoid them or boldly cross their path.
  • Watch over Kaelen (Presence TN 12): The Rot agitates Kaelen — her mark blazes, her skin runs hot, she stumbles and presses her hands to the earth murmuring about corruption in the root-lines.
  • Scout the Steam-Oasis approach (Intuition TN 14): Scout ahead to determine if the Heitfolk settlement has changed and whether it's safe to approach.
  • Rally for the home stretch (Presence TN 12): Steam-Oasis is visible — warmth and shelter are close. A rousing moment shores up morale for the final push.

Round 2 Interlude: The Steam-Oasis Approach. Thermal vents visible on the horizon, but the steam rises in organized patterns — shaped, deliberate, almost like a signal. Fewer lights than before. The Heitfolk are quieter. Prepared. Waiting.

Outcomes

Hard Success (6+ successes, 0–1 failures): Party reaches Steam-Oasis in good condition, ahead of schedule. Heat preserved; no supply costs. The early arrival gives Hildvarð time to open the deep storage — she produces the Iron Lantern of the Keeper. Gain 2 Milestones.

Success (6+ successes, 2 failures): Reach Steam-Oasis with minor costs — 1 Heat consumed or one PC takes Frostbite/Sickened. Gain 1 Victory.

Partial Failure (4–5 successes, 3 failures): Reach Steam-Oasis at significant cost. Lose 2 Heat, or one PC takes an injury-level condition. Heitfolk are already mobilizing with less time for dialogue.

Hard Failure (fewer than 4 successes): Reach Steam-Oasis exhausted. All PCs lose 1 Hit Die. Must rest a full day before continuing.
